title: Cartoon Genders
description:
Never asked yourself why cartoon porn was invented? Here's one theory!

-------------------------

I had nightmares while making this animation...
Flash kept crashing, forcing me to split the project into a dozen of little files... The moment I managed to merge them togheter will always be one of my biggest achievement. 
And that's quite sad.
